---
title: "Research"
pagetitle: "Research — Duc Thai Tran"
---

```{=html}
<section class="block" style="border-bottom:none; padding-bottom:1rem;">
  <p class="eyebrow"><span class="num">02</span> Research</p>
  <p class="block__lead">Advertising creativity and effectiveness, studied with mixed methods — from the client brief to the creative appraisal to the audience response.</p>
</section>

<section style="padding-bottom:2rem;">
  <div class="index">

    <article class="index__row">
      <div class="index__num">01</div>
      <div>
        <h3 class="index__title"><a href="#">Brand integration in narrative advertising</a></h3>
        <p class="index__meta"><span class="venue">American Academy of Advertising (AAA)</span> · Conference paper, 2026 · with S. Koslow &amp; A. Mirzaei</p>
        <div class="index__links"><a href="#">Abstract</a><a href="#">PDF</a></div>
      </div>
      <div class="index__tag is-live">Accepted</div>
    </article>

    <article class="index__row">
      <div class="index__num">02</div>
      <div>
        <h3 class="index__title"><a href="#">Client and creative factors in advertising creativity</a></h3>
        <p class="index__meta"><span class="venue">Journal of Advertising</span> · Under preparation · Feedback Intervention Theory &amp; creative appraisal</p>
        <div class="index__links"><a href="#">Working abstract</a></div>
      </div>
      <div class="index__tag is-live">In progress</div>
    </article>

    <article class="index__row">
      <div class="index__num">03</div>
      <div>
        <h3 class="index__title"><a href="#">Working paper title goes here</a></h3>
        <p class="index__meta"><span class="venue">Venue / journal</span> · Year · Co-authors</p>
        <div class="index__links"><a href="#">DOI</a><a href="#">PDF</a></div>
      </div>
      <div class="index__tag">Working paper</div>
    </article>

  </div>
</section>

<footer class="site-foot">
  <span>Duc Thai Tran — Sydney</span>
  <span><a href="mailto:you@example.com">you@example.com</a></span>
  <span>© 2026</span>
</footer>
```
